stories.title: AI, science and the risks in China’s reliance on imported precision equipment
stories.simple_summary: China relies heavily on imported precision equipment for AI development, and this creates risks if those supplies are cut off or controlled by other countries.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to investors and government policy makers — nothing you need to act on personally.

stories.title: OpenAI says GPT 5.6 is the ‘preferred model’ for Microsoft Copilot 365 amid breakup chatter
stories.simple_summary: OpenAI's newest AI software will continue to power Microsoft's workplace programs like the ones used in many offices.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use Microsoft Office tools at work, they may get smarter AI features, but this doesn't require you to do anything.

stories.title: Microsoft’s carbon emissions went up 25 percent last year
stories.simple_summary: Microsoft's energy use and pollution went up 25% last year, mostly because they're building more computer power for AI.
stories.why_it_matters: This is mainly a concern for environmentally-minded investors — it doesn't directly affect your business operations.

stories.title: Fidji Simo steps down from OpenAI’s no. 2 role
stories.simple_summary: A top leader at OpenAI is stepping down from her full-time job due to a health condition that requires ongoing treatment.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to investors watching OpenAI — it doesn't affect everyday users of AI tools.

stories.title: Fidji Simo steps down from leading OpenAI’s AGI work due to illness
stories.simple_summary: The same OpenAI leader is moving to part-time work instead of leading their AGI (advanced AI) research team.
stories.why_it_matters: This is company news for investors — it doesn't change how AI works for regular people.

stories.title: OpenAI launches its new family of models with GPT-5.6
stories.simple_summary: OpenAI released a new version of their AI software (GPT-5.6) that they say works better in several areas, including protecting against computer attacks.
stories.why_it_matters: Better AI security is good for everyone, though you probably won't notice changes unless you use OpenAI's tools directly.

stories.title: An AI agent startup just let its agent run its $100M fundraise
stories.simple_summary: A company used its own AI robot worker to handle all the paperwork and meetings needed to raise $100 million in funding, proving the AI actually works well.
stories.why_it_matters: This is impressive technology news but mostly relevant to tech investors — small businesses aren't using AI agents this advanced yet.

stories.title: OpenAI is shutting down Atlas, but its AI browser ambitions are still growing
stories.simple_summary: OpenAI is shutting down its AI web browser product, but moving some of those features to its desktop app and Chrome extension.
stories.why_it_matters: If you were using OpenAI's browser, you'll need to switch, but the AI features are still available in other forms.

stories.title: Elon Musk praises Mythos/Fable, promises not to ‘cut off’ Anthropic
stories.simple_summary: Elon Musk says a competing AI company (Anthropic) can trust him to run their computer servers safely and won't cut off their access.
stories.why_it_matters: This is business and investment news — it doesn't affect regular people unless you use Anthropic's AI tools.

stories.title: OpenAI launches new system the Trump administration initially put on a leash
stories.simple_summary: OpenAI launched a new AI system that the Trump administration had briefly restricted.
stories.why_it_matters: Without more details, it's hard to say what this means — check back when there's clearer information about what the system does.

stories.title: Can AI answer the $3 trillion question?
stories.simple_summary: Technology companies and investors are debating whether AI tools actually save money and boost profits enough to justify the huge spending on them.
stories.why_it_matters: This matters to business owners thinking about investing in AI — if AI doesn't deliver real results, that's important to know before you spend money.

stories.title: If I Could Only Buy 1 Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stock, This Would Be It
stories.simple_summary: A financial website is recommending one particular AI-related stock as their top pick for investors.
stories.why_it_matters: This is investment advice — talk to a financial advisor before buying any stock based on headlines like this.
